import click

@click.command()
def sync():
    # Violation: config file loaded per command invocation
    with open("config.yaml") as f:
        config = yaml.safe_load(f)
    print(f"Syncing {config['endpoint']}")

@click.command()
def backup():
    with open("config.yaml") as f:
        config = yaml.safe_load(f)
    print(f"Backing up to {config['storage']}")
